prediction.summary: An external IP address, 203.0.113.45, conducted a brute-force attack against the SSH service. Over a period of 33 seconds, 11 different usernames were targeted with failed password attempts. The connection was subsequently closed, and no successful logins were observed in the provided logs.

recommendations: Block the source IP address 203.0.113.45 at the network perimeter firewall.
Review SSH server logs for any successful logins from this IP address or related activity that may have occurred outside the provided log window.
Implement or strengthen account lockout policies for SSH to prevent future brute-force attempts.
Consider deploying an intrusion prevention system (IPS) or a tool like Fail2Ban to automatically detect and block such attempts.
Ensure SSH is configured to use strong authentication methods (e.g., key-based authentication) and disable password authentication if feasible.
